zh.Aylesbury, Buckinghamshire, England: 英國巴金哈姆爾艾勒斯波利

zh.St Mary's Church, Aylesbury, Buckinghams: 英國巴金哈姆爾艾勒斯波利聖 馬也斯 邱奇
zh.lifeSummary: 當Julyan Tripplett於1572年出生在英國巴金哈姆爾艾勒斯波利時，她的父親John Triplett24歲，母親Judith Jackson22歲。她於1592年2月12日與Thomas Hoare在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾艾勒斯波利結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1619年2月11日在她的家鄉享年47歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Julyan Tripplett于1572年出生在英国巴金哈姆爾艾勒斯波利时，她的父亲John Triplett24岁，母亲Judith Jackson22岁。她于1592年2月12日与Thomas Hoare在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾艾勒斯波利结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1619年2月11日在她的家乡享年47岁。

variants.name: Julian
meanings: From the common Late Latin name Julianus, a derivative of Julius . In classical times Julianus was a name borne not only by various minor early saints, but also by the Roman emperor Julian ‘the Apostate’, who attempted to return the Roman Empire from institutionalized Christianity to paganism. For many centuries the English name Julian was borne by women as well as men, for example by the Blessed Julian of Norwich ( c.1342– after 1413 ). The differentiation in form between Julian and Gillian did not develop until the 16th century. Julian is still occasionally used as a girl's name. Notable bearers include the British classical guitarist Julian Bream ( b. 1933 ) and the British jazz pianist and bandleader Julian Joseph ( b. 1966 ).

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

en.lifeSummary: When Julyan Tripplett was born in 1572, in Aylesbury, Buckinghamshire, England, her father, John Triplett, was 24 and her mother, Judith Jackson, was 22. She married Thomas Hoare on 12 February 1592, in Aylesbury, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 11 February 1619, in her hometown, at the age of 47.

fr.St Mary's Church, Aylesbury, Buckinghams: St Mary's Church, Aylesbury, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Julyan Tripplett est née en 1572, à Aylesbury, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, John Triplett, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Judith Jackson, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Hoare le 12 février 1592, à Aylesbury, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 11 février 1619, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 47 ans.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Julyan Tripplett è nata il nel 1572 nel Aylesbury, Buckinghamshire, England, sua padre, John Triplett, aveva 24 anni e sua madre, Judith Jackson, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato Thomas Hoare il 12 febbraio 1592, nel Aylesbury, Buckinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 11 febbraio 1619, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 47 anni.

ko.St Mary's Church, Aylesbury, Buckinghams: 영국 벅잉함실르 아일레스버이 스트 마이'스 c후르치
ko.lifeSummary: Julyan Tripplett(이)가 1572년 영국 벅잉함실르 아일레스버이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Triplett(은)는 24세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Judith Jackson(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1592년 2월 12일 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 아일레스버이에서 Thomas Hoare(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1619년 2월 11일 그녀의 고향에서 47세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Julyan Tripplett nasceu em 1572, em Aylesbury, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Triplett, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Judith Jackson, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas Hoare em 12 de fevereiro de 1592, em Aylesbury, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas. ru.St Mary's Church, Aylesbury, Buckinghams: ст мэри'с чурч, аилесбури, буккингхамшир, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Julyan Tripplett родилась в 1572 г. в местности аилесбури, буккингхамшир, Англия, её отцу по имени John Triplett было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Judith Jackson, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Hoare 12 февраля 1592 г. в местности аилесбури, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла 11 февраля 1619 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 47 лет.
